_description: Pre-written solution narratives for each vertical. The agent uses these to provide rich, vertical-specific context when presenting product recommendations.

Parking Payment Systems.narrative: ID TECH's parking solutions are built for high-volume, unattended environments. Our readers handle everything from gated entry/exit systems to pay-on-foot kiosks, with weatherproof designs rated for outdoor deployment and contactless tap-and-go support that keeps traffic moving.
key_differentiators: Integration with major parking management systems
Support for magstripe, chip, and NFC/contactless

Transit Payment Solutions.narrative: Transit demands speed, reliability, and durability. ID TECH readers are deployed in buses, trains, and fare gates worldwide — handling vibration, temperature extremes, and constant use. Our contactless-first designs support open-loop and closed-loop fare collection with sub-300ms transaction times.
key_differentiators: Compact form factors for tight installations

Loyalty Program Contactless Readers.narrative: ID TECH's retail and loyalty readers blend into the counter with sleek, compact designs. They handle contactless payments, loyalty cards, and mobile wallets seamlessly — making every transaction fast and frictionless. Pin-on-glass and display options create a modern checkout experience.

Vending Payment Systems.narrative: For unattended vending and kiosk applications, ID TECH delivers compact, low-power readers that fit into tight spaces. Our devices support the full range of payment methods — contactless cards, mobile wallets, and traditional magstripe — while drawing minimal power for battery or solar-powered installations.
key_differentiators: Low power draw for battery operation
MDB and pulse interfaces for vending

EV Charging Station Payment Solutions.narrative: EV charging stations need payment hardware that's weatherproof, reliable, and compliant with open payment standards. ID TECH's outdoor-rated readers withstand rain, snow, dust, and temperature extremes while providing seamless contactless and chip payment acceptance.
key_differentiators: Compact for integration into charging pedestals
